title: Wapi Kapidō Nattsu!!
overview: In this episode, we meet Suguri and her chance encounter with Kappi on a bridge.

title: Sora Tobu Guri-chan
overview: If you're Suguri and Kappi, how would you go after a lost bird? How about a flying lollipop?

title: Kappi no Otetsudai
overview: In this episode, Kappi tries to help out with the cleaning in various ways.

title: Odekake kappi
overview: In this episode, Kappi goes out to the park. He was asked to stay quiet, but his stomach and his love for donuts spell quite an adventure.

title: Dotchi ga umā ma?
overview: If you're Kappi and you have the choice between donuts and traditional Japanese confections, but choosing one will alienate a friend, what would you do?

title: Dokuroppi ga Kita!
overview: In this episode, we introduce Dokuroppi, Kappi's "friend".

title: Sayonara Kappi
overview: In this episode, Dokuroppi actually is helpful and nice in many ways.

title: Sutekina Purezento
overview: In this episode Suguri makes a present for Kappi. However, what else is really going on and who is giving what to whom?

title: Hoippi Gaki Chatta!
overview: In this episode, we introduce Whippi. Her relatively short visit is rather exciting (and rather troublesome).

title: Guri-chan no Dai Henshin
overview: In this episode, Suguri gets a taste of what it is like to be an adult.

title: Kaitō Kobara-chan!?
overview: In this episode, we introduce Kobara, Kappi's little sister. Unfortunately, Suguri finds out really quickly that Kobara is a kleptomaniac, and the way she steals things usually will not go her way.

title: Kappi no Ama Yadori
overview: In this episode, we explore what Kappi would do when he takes shelter from the rain and takes a cat under his wing.

title: Minna ga Ichidoni Yattekita
overview: Imagine the sheer chaos when everyone from Kappimeshia shows up at Suguri's home!

title: Hashire! Guri-chan
overview: In this episode, Suguri's attempt to disguise Kappi as a talking stuffed animal backfires, and Kappi's magic allows Suguri to bypass construction on the bridge.

title: Chuchuburesu ga Kie Chatta
overview: In this episode, Whippi manages to throw Suguri's bracelet out the window, where it gets picked up by various animals in the area.

title: Happī Naki Nenbi
overview: In this episode, Suguri and Kappi make a wedding anniversary into something very memorable.

title: Kyanpu de Dai Bou-sō
overview: In this episode, the family goes camping. However, when Kappi eats spicy things such as curry, things go completely topsy-turvy.

title: Min'nadetakara Sagashi
overview: This episode is a continuation of the previous episode. Apparently in this camping area there is a Kappimeshian treasure buried here... and Whippi and Kobara are trying to find it when they run into Suguri, Kappi, and Dokuroppi.

title: Chitchaku Natte Umāma
overview: In this episode, Suguri, An, and Kappi experience the wonders of being tiny.

title: Koisuru wan-chan
overview: In this episode, Suguri and Kappi play matchmaker.

title: Okashina Kontesuto
overview: Most likely everyone is familiar with the phrase "too many cooks spoil the soup". In this episode, you can correct this to "too many capybaras and magic spoil the cake".

title: Fushigi na omoide dama
overview: This episode of Happy Kappi is about as close as you'll probably get to something that resembles the Twilight Zone in strangeness. In this episode, Suguri, Kappi, and Whippi end up getting trapped in a magical sphere of memories.

title: Kappi to Ōgenka
overview: In this episode, Suguri and Kappi get into a dispute over something that adults would consider trivial.

title: Mahō ga Tsukaenai!
overview: In this episode, Kappi is suddenly unable to do magic. On top of that, he has been summoned back to Kappimeshia. Will Suguri be able to get her favorite accessory to him before he is sucked into the portal?
